description.value: Aura faint evocation; CL 1st; Slot none; Price 720 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This tiny glass bead transforms itself into a small (2-foot-tall) pile of burning logs whenever its command word is spoken. The fire burns for 8 hours or until extinguished, at which point it turns back into a bead. The owner of the item must wait twice as long as the fire burned before he can order the bead to become a campfire again. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, produce flame; Cost 360 gp
